title: psychilis × raganii
intro: Psychilis × raganii, also known as the Psychilis Raganii, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to Central America. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Psychilis × raganii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Psychilis × raganii can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including tinctures, infusions, and salves, although its availability and use are often restricted due to conservation efforts.
